hero.badge: SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT • DATA ENGINEERING • ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
hero.tagline: I build intelligent, data-driven solutions by combining Data Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and Software Development to solve real-world problems. My passion lies in transforming raw data into actionable insights and scalable applications that drive meaningful impact.
bioParagraphs: Supported by professional certification as an Associate Data Scientist (BNSP), hands-on machine learning research, and experience leading software development projects, I have developed expertise across the entire data lifecycle—from data acquisition, preprocessing, and feature engineering to predictive modeling, evaluation, visualization, and application development.

Beyond data engineering, I design and develop end-to-end web applications while creating intuitive, user-centered interfaces through UI/UX principles. My multidisciplinary background enables me to bridge data engineering, artificial intelligence, and software engineering into scalable, efficient, and impactful digital solutions.

I am passionate about continuous learning, embracing emerging technologies, and solving complex problems through analytical thinking. My goal is to build reliable, efficient, and intelligent systems that empower organizations to make better decisions, improve operational efficiency, and accelerate digital transformation.

timeline.title: Experience
timeline.subtitle: A visual map of my academic, professional, and research milestones.

ml-research.description: Conducting undergraduate research focused on PM2.5 air quality prediction using a hybrid Sine Cosine Algorithm (SCA) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) model. Responsible for collecting and preprocessing datasets, performing feature engineering, optimizing deep learning models, and evaluating prediction performance using RMSE, MAPE, and R². The research demonstrates the practical application of machine learning techniques to address real-world environmental challenges and serves as the foundation for scientific publication.

bbkb-intern.project: Ministry of Industry of the Republic of Indonesia
bbkb-intern.description: Contributed to the development of SIMAGANG, a web-based internship registration and management system designed to digitize internship administration within BBSPJIKB Yogyakarta. Collaborated with the development team to build frontend and backend features, integrate database functionality, implement authentication, and optimize application workflows. This experience strengthened my practical skills in full-stack software development, teamwork, and delivering secure, scalable, and user-centered digital solutions.

istana-sayur.description: Led the end-to-end development of an e-commerce website for Istana Sayur Buah, coordinating a multidisciplinary team from project planning through deployment. Collaborated directly with stakeholders to gather business requirements, define project scope, and ensure the delivered solution aligned with client needs. Contributed to UI/UX design by creating intuitive user flows and responsive interfaces while supporting development, testing, and deployment. This project strengthened my leadership, communication, project management, and product development skills in delivering real-world digital solutions.
